lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Gertrude.

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Have you seen my poor Fluffs?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm afraid not.

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: What about Shilop?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No sign of him either.

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Hmmm...strange, he should be at the market.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, are you okay?

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Do I look okay? Those kids drive me crazy.

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: I'm sorry. It's just that I've lost her.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Lost who?

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Fluffs, poor Fluffs. She never hurt anyone.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who's Fluffs?

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: My beloved feline friend Fluffs. She's been purring by my side for almost a decade. Please, could you go search for her while I look over the kids?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I suppose I could.

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Really? Thank you so much! I really have no idea where she could be!

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: I think my sons, Shilop and Wilough, saw the cat last. They'll be out in the market place.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Alright then, I'll see what I can do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I'm too busy to play pet rescue.

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Well, okay then. I'll have to find someone else.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where did you say you saw Fluffs?

lines.speaker: Wilough
lines.text: Weren't you listening? I saw the flea bag in the old lumber mill just north east of here. Just walk past the Jolly Boar Inn and you should find it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Gertrude.

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Hello again, did you manage to find Shilop? I can't keep an eye on him for the life of me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: He does seem quite a handful.

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: You have no idea! Did he help at all?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think so, I'm just going to look now.

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Thanks again, adventurer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there, I've been looking for you.

lines.speaker: Wilough/Shilop
lines.text: I didn't mean to take it! I just forgot to pay.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What? I'm trying to help your mum find Fluffs.

lines.speaker: Wilough
lines.text: I might be able to help. Fluffs followed me to my secret play area, I haven't seen her since.

lines.speaker: Wilough
lines.text: Ohh...well, in that case I might be able to help. Fluffs followed me to my secret play area, I haven't seen her since.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where is this play area?

lines.speaker: Wilough
lines.text: If I told you that, it wouldn't be a secret.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me sonny, or I will hurt you.

lines.speaker: Wilough
lines.text: W..wh..what?! Y..you wouldn't! A young lad like me! I'd have you behind bars before nightfall!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What will make you tell me?

lines.speaker: Shilop
lines.text: Well...now you ask, I am a bit short on cash.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How much?

lines.speaker: Shilop
lines.text: 10 coins.

lines.speaker: Wilough
lines.text: 10 coins?!

lines.speaker: Wilough
lines.text: I'll handle this.

lines.speaker: Wilough
lines.text: 100 coins should cover it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: 100 coins! Why should I pay you?

lines.speaker: Wilough
lines.text: You shouldn't, but we won't help otherwise. We never liked that cat anyway, so what do you say?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not paying you a penny.

lines.speaker: Wilough
lines.text: Okay then, I'll find another way to make money.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay then, I'll pay.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: There you go, now where did you see Fluffs ?

lines.speaker: Wilough
lines.text: I play at an abandoned lumber mill to the north east. Just beyond the Jolly Boar Inn. I saw Fluffs running around in there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Anything else?

lines.speaker: Wilough
lines.text: Well, you'll have to find the broken fence to get in. I'm sure you can manage that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, never mind, it's Fluffs' loss.

lines.speaker: Wilough
lines.text: I'm sure my mum will get over it.

lines.speaker: Fluffs' kitten
lines.text: Mew!

lines.speaker: Fluffs
lines.text: Miaoww

lines.speaker: Fluffs
lines.text: Hisss!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ouch!

lines.speaker: Fluffs
lines.text: Hisss!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ouch!

lines.speaker: Fluffs
lines.text: Mew!

lines.speaker: Fluffs
lines.text: Hisss!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ouch!

sections.title: Talking to Shilop and Wilough again

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again.

lines.speaker: Shilop
lines.text: You think you're tough do you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Pardon?

lines.speaker: Shilop
lines.text: I can beat anyone up!

lines.speaker: Wilough
lines.text: He can you know!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again.

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Hello. How's it going? Any luck?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I've found Fluffs!

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Well well, you are clever! Did you bring her back?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, that's the thing, she refuses to leave.

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Oh dear, oh dear! Maybe she's just hungry. She loves doogle sardines but I'm all out.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Doogle sardines?

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Yes, raw sardines seasoned with doogle leaves. Unfortunately I've used all my doogle leaves, but you may find some in the woods out back.

sections.title: Giving the seasoned sardines to Fluffs

lines.speaker: Fluffs
lines.text: Mew!

lines.speaker: Fluffs
lines.text: Hisss!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ouch!

sections.title: Talking to Gertrude after giving Fluffs the sardine

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Hey traveller, did Fluffs eat the sardines?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah, she loved them, but she still won't leave.

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Well that is strange, there must be a reason.

lines.speaker: Fluffs
lines.text: Purr...

lines.speaker: Fluffs' kitten
lines.text: Purr...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Gertrude. Fluffs ran off with her kitten.

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: You're back! Thank you! Thank you! Fluffs just came back! I think she was just upset as she couldn't find her kitten.

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: If you hadn't found her kitten it would have died out there!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's okay, I like to do my bit.

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: I don't know how to thank you. I have no real material possessions. I do have kittens! I can only really look after one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, if it needs a home.

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: I would sell it to my cousin in West Ardougne. I hear there's a rat epidemic there. But it's too far.

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Here you go, look after her and thank you again!

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Oh by the way, the kitten can live in your backpack, but to make it grow you must take it out and feed and stroke it often.
